overall.description: Gameplay footage from GTA V showing a first-person perspective walking steadily along a desert highway shoulder. Various vehicles including cars, trucks, buses, and motorcycles pass by on the multi-lane road, while the camera approaches and passes under a large concrete overpass with mountains visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway shoulder with tree line and passing traffic

events.description: motorcycle passes by on the highway followed by several cars

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt highway shoulder parallel to traffic

notable_agents.action: classic muscle car driving past on the highway

entered.detail: large concrete highway overpass spanning across the road in the distance
mountainous terrain visible in the background under cloudy sky
dense green trees and bushes lining the highway shoulder
tall electrical transmission towers visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a desert highway with the camera walking along the dirt shoulder. Dense vegetation lines the right side while vehicles pass by on the left. A large concrete overpass is visible in the distance against a backdrop of mountains and power lines.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway approach with road sign and rocky terrain

events.description: yellow Cluckin' Bell food truck passes closely by on the highway
large white Dashound tour bus drives past on the highway

agents.ego_description: continuing along the shoulder, passing a diamond-shaped road warning sign

notable_agents.action: white Dashound tour bus with black windows driving past

entered.detail: diamond-shaped yellow road warning sign on a metal pole
rocky hillside replacing the tree line along the shoulder

segments.scene_description: The camera passes a diamond-shaped road sign as the tree line gives way to rocky terrain on the right. A distinctive yellow food truck and a large white tour bus pass by on the highway, while the overpass ahead grows larger in the frame.

events.description: walking under the concrete highway overpass, entering shadow
convoy of large trucks including a semi and box truck pass by

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass with heavy truck traffic passing overhead and alongside

notable_agents.action: large semi-truck with trailer passing under the overpass

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass structure passing overhead
thick concrete pillars supporting the overpass deck

segments.scene_description: The camera moves beneath the massive concrete overpass, entering a shaded area with heavy truck traffic. The terrain is now fully rocky and desert-like. Various large trucks including semis and box trucks pass by in both directions as the camera continues under the span before emerging back into open terrain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement along a desert highway shoulder that transitions from a vegetated roadside into a shaded industrial underpass. It begins with the camera walking past dense greenery while vehicles stream by on the left, with a distant concrete overpass framed against mountains and power lines. As the camera passes a diamond-shaped road sign, the lush tree line gives way to rocky terrain and a yellow food truck and white tour bus pass in the adjacent lanes. The scene then shifts as the camera moves beneath the massive concrete span, entering a shaded zone filled with heavy semi and box truck traffic. Finally, the camera continues through the rocky desert landscape, emerging from the shadow of the overpass back into the open sunlight.
